title: My Grandfather is a Nihonjin (KIFF 2026)
synopsis: Noboru, a young Japanese-American boy seeks answers about his heritage from his reluctant grandfather, uncovering unexpected family secrets and a hidden connection that changes everything about his heritage from his reluctant grandfather, uncovering unexpected family secrets and a hidden connection that changes everything.

synopsis_lang.en: Noboru, a young Japanese-American boy seeks answers about his heritage from his reluctant grandfather, uncovering unexpected family secrets and a hidden connection that changes everything about his heritage from his reluctant grandfather, uncovering unexpected family secrets and a hidden connection that changes everything.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 日裔少年阿昇一直對自己的身份認同感到迷惘。為了尋找家族的根源，他決定敲開爺爺那扇緊閉的心門。然而，爺爺對過去絕口不提，態度冷淡。在阿昇鍥而不捨的追問下，意外扯出一件塵封數十年的家族秘密。這段被刻意隱瞞的過去，不僅揭開了家族的掙扎與犧牲，更連繫著一個顛覆阿昇想像的隱密羈絆。這個發現將徹底改寫他對家族、對自己，以至對未來的定義。

subtitle: Chinese
